name: Orbit
description: Orbit — Developer community management platform for tracking contributor activity, engagement, and community growth.

seo.title: Orbit — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Orbit: Orbit — Developer community management platform for tracking contributor activity, engagement, and community growth.

when_to_use: Track open-source contributor activity and engagement
Community health dashboards for developer relations
Segment contributors by activity level and tenure
Automate community outreach based on activity signals

pros: Tracks contributors across GitHub, Discord, Slack
Love and reach scoring for community engagement
cons: Orbit wound down public SaaS in 2024
Not observability in the engineering sense
Existing users migrated to Common Room
review.verdict: Once category-defining community intelligence, but sunset status makes it non-viable for new adopters.
review.best_for: Legacy Orbit users still on the platform during transition.
review.not_for: New teams; pick Common Room or Savvy instead.
